Patient reports weight loss and altered bowel habit over 10 weeks, with increasing severity. Patient also reports night sweats. Relevant history includes ischaemic heart disease.


CT TAP on 14/06/2024: upper rectum thickening with multiple enlarged mesenteric nodes; no distant metastases.
